name: Is it legal for Chicago lawyers to use AI for client referrals without telling me?
description: Legal but risky; undisclosed AI referrals can lead to negligence claims in IL.

mainEntity.name: Is it legal for Chicago lawyers to use AI for client referrals without telling me?

acceptedAnswer.text: Legal but risky; undisclosed AI referrals can lead to negligence claims in IL.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, it's legal, but lack of disclosure could support a negligence claim if it harmed you. Illinois ethics rules require competence; undisclosed AI risks may violate that. Key factors: (1) Informed consent not obtained; (2) AI led to improper referral; (3) Resulting damages. Review engagement letter for AI mentions. File a bar complaint or sue for malpractice; Chicago courts scrutinize tech use in law.
